title: Redstone overpower
description: Give your redstone contraptions a whole new level
body:
Adds a series of redstone elements that allows some optimisation like logical gates, ducts and a lot more of future additions we are currently building.

## Current blocks
### Logical comparator
- Works as a configurable logical gate block, two inputs/one output.
- Can work as AND, OR, XOR, NAND, NOR and NXOR.

### Duct
Works like a hopper with three main differences:
- It only push, doesnt pull anything inside.
- It has only one inventory slot.
- The inventory can be toggled to block one item inside, allowing filtering of stackable items.

### Sticky chains
_This is not an original idea, but we thought it should be included in this mod too._

It allows to stick blocks to the sides of a chain block, allowing more complact slime/honey redstone contraptions.

The original idea is from [carpet mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet).

### Sculk noteblock
Just a regular music block, but corrupted with sculk. It can handle only 15 notes and it doesnt play different instruments.

Each note triggers a sound in a specific frequency that can be detected from calibrated sculk sensors.

This should make wireless redstone much more simplet, allowing the player to automate every sound frequency generation.

### Sculk chamber
Pulse chambers can store up to one sculk pulse and release it when powered with redstone. It can be a good way to store codified data.

### Sculk pulser
Transforms a redstone input into the equivalent sculk pulse signal.
Very similar to sculk noteblocks but for slightly different scenarios.

### Sculk amethyst
When corrupted by sculk, amethyst buds can be transformed in sculk amethyst buds, that will grow echo shards instead of amethyst crystals.

This is just a way to make echo shards more accessible for some recipes introduced with the previous blocks and future recipes.
